zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan la Zouche I I於1205年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby24歲，母親Margaret Bisset26歲。他於1242年與Helen Quincy在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1267年在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦被列為constable。他去世於1270年8月10日在英國戴文諾斯 莫爾頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利。

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Georges, Adrien.
from Old French bosche ‘large bundle of firewood’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a seller of such bundles.

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alan la Zouche I I was born in 1205, in Leicestershire, England, his father, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Bisset, was 26. He married Helen Quincy in 1242, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1267, at the age of 62, his occupation is listed as constable in Tower of London, Middlesex, England. He died on 10 August 1270, in North Molton, Devon, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan la Zouche I I est né en 1205, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bisset, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Helen Quincy en 1242, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1267, à l’âge de 62 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 10 août 1270, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan la Zouche I I 1205 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Bisset 26. Er hat 1242 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Helen Quincy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1267, als er 62 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable in Tower of London, Middlesex, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. August 1270 im Alter von 65 Jahren in North Molton, Devon, England und wurde in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan la Zouche I I è nato il nel 1205 nel Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Bisset, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Helen Quincy nel 1242, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1267, all'età di 62 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England. Morì il 10 agosto 1270, nel North Molton, Devon, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Brackley, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan la Zouche I Iが1205年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashbyは24歳，母Margaret Bissetは26歳であった。1242年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでHelen Quincyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1267年，62歳の時，イギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンでの職業はconstableと記録されている。彼は1270年8月10日にイギリスデボンノース モルトンで65歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan la Zouche I I(이)가 1205년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Bisset(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Helen Quincy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1267년, 62세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 constable이었다. 그는 1270년 8월 10일 영국 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan la Zouche I I nasceu em 1205, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bisset, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Quincy em 1242, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1267, com 62 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1270, em North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan la Zouche I I родился в 1205 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bisset, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Quincy в 1242 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1267 году, в возрасте 62 лет,  он работал по профессии constable в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. Он умер 10 августа 1270 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan la Zouche I I nació en 1205, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Bisset, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Helen Quincy en 1242, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1267, a la edad de 62 años, su ocupación registrada era constable en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1270, en North Molton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
